column1: California Department of Fish and Wildlife - Lower Sacramento Rotary Screw Trap Daily Catch and Effort Summaries - 2024-2025 Emigration Season
Data are Draft and Subject to Revision. Half cone fishing configuration results in reduction of catch and CPUE calculations are not comparable to fishing in the full cone configuration.
Please Direct Inquiries to David Custer, 916-767-3792, David.Custer@wildlife.ca.gov
